    n = nums.length
    if n == 0
        return -1
    end

    # Step 1: Precalculate Suffix Minimums
    # suffix_min[i] stores min(nums[i...n-1])
    suffix_min = Array.new(n)
    suffix_min[n - 1] = nums[n - 1]
    for i in (n - 2).downto(0)
        suffix_min[i] = [nums[i], suffix_min[i + 1]].min
    end

    # Step 2: Iterate and Check Stability

    current_max = -Float::INFINITY 

    for i in 0...n
        # Update Prefix Maximum
        current_max = [current_max, nums[i]].max

        # Get Suffix Minimum
        min_suffix = suffix_min[i]

        # Calculate Unstable Value: max(nums[0..i]) - min(nums[i..n-1])
        unstable_value = current_max - min_suffix

        # Check if it is a stable index
        if unstable_value <= k
            return i
        end
    end

    # Step 3: Handle No Stable Index
    return -1
end
